guardrail: This sensitivity audit removes blockers only in explicit what-if scenarios. It does not change the diffusion readiness status, accept manual labels, relax gates in production, or create calibrated diffusion coefficients.

top_blockers.evidence: 1 automatic physics-consistent ROI and 0 publication-ready diffusion candidates.
top_blockers.next_action: Do not state calibrated material diffusion coefficients until manual labels and gate pass criteria are satisfied.

top_blockers.evidence: 0 automatic positive proxy candidates and 0 publication diffusion candidates in the control-balanced sanity audit.
top_blockers.next_action: Keep diffusion wording as optical-front proxy unless this independent sanity audit produces accepted candidates.

top_blockers.evidence: Best control-balanced diffusion-proxy event/control p-value is 0.3136.
top_blockers.next_action: Use source/event-balanced tests for prioritization only, not physical diffusion inference.

top_blockers.evidence: 0/33 scanned HDF5 files have spatial-calibration-like attribute hits; slide evidence gives 96 nm/px.
top_blockers.next_action: Locate raw microscope calibration metadata or independently verify the 96 nm/px scale.
Use this gate to restrict manual review and avoid reporting failed candidates as diffusion coefficients.
Use this gate to restrict manual review and avoid reporting failed candidates as diffusion coefficients.

top_blockers.evidence: 0 manual front-effect labels and 0 manual diffusion-interpretable labels accepted; 52 pending/not accepted.
top_blockers.next_action: Review and label the manual-QC packet before treating front motion as physical diffusion.

top_blockers.evidence: 24/72 ROI pass the HDF5 timing-stability gate; max source dt max/median ratio is 13.78.
top_blockers.next_action: Prioritize source-level timestamp validation before physical units are used in claims.
